refnamediv.refpurpose: Rotates a geometry about the X axis.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Rotates a geometry geomA - rotRadians about the X axis.

note.para: ST_RotateX(geomA, rotRadians) is short-hand for ST_Affine(geomA, 1, 0, 0, 0, cos(rotRadians), -sin(rotRadians), 0, sin(rotRadians), cos(rotRadians), 0, 0, 0).

refsection.para: Enhanced: 2.0.0 support for Polyhedral surfaces, Triangles and TIN was introduced.
Availability: 1.1.2. Name changed from RotateX to ST_RotateX in 1.2.2

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: --Rotate a line 90 degrees along x-axis SELECT ST_AsEWKT(ST_RotateX(ST_GeomFromEWKT('LINESTRING(1 2 3, 1 1 1)'), pi()/2)); st_asewkt --------------------------- LINESTRING(1 -3 2,1 -1 1)
